subcodes.first_line: O thou who art serving at the Pilgrim House of the Lord! Thou art a servant, but in reality thou art ministered unto—a steward, but in truth master of all
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم مهمانخانه حق هر چند خادمی فی الحقیقه مخدومی هرچه بظاهر بنده ولی بحقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @service to others; to the Cause of God
